errors.networkProblem: There is a problem, please try again later

ror.heading: Research Organization Registry (ROR) Integration
ror.introSuffix: with your RSpace instance, you ensure the research outputs produced in RSpace are connected with your research organisation. All research outputs with a DOI will automatically include the ROR ID in their affiliation metadata.
ror.invalidFormatHelp: Please ensure the ROR ID is one of the following formats:
ror.linkHelpSuffix: to associate with this RSpace Instance.
ror.searchHelpMiddle: to ensure you are adding the correct ROR ID. If your institution does not have a ROR ID, you can submit a
ror.unlinkHelpPrefix: A ROR ID is linked to this RSpace Instance. Click on
ror.unlinkHelpSuffix: to remove the association. Future published or updated DOIs will not include the ROR ID.

aliasDialog.description: SysAdmins can set a username alias for a user, enabling both the username and its alias to be used during login. The alias is only recognised during the login process, and does not replace the user’s username as their main identifier inside RSpace.
aliasDialog.title: Set Username Alias

usersPage.billableUsersTooltip: Enabled users and PIs, excluding admins.

deleteDialog.confirmUsername: To delete <0>{fullName}</0>'s account please enter their username.
deleteDialog.formsAndTemplatesNotice: The user you are trying to delete is <0>{ownerOfFormsAndTemplates}</0> To ensure continued access to these Forms/Templates, the system<1> {willTransferOwnership}</1> of those files to<2> {thisSystemAdministrator}</2> account. Forms and Templates that are not used by others will be deleted.
deleteDialog.formsNotice: The user you are trying to delete is <0>{ownerOfForms}</0> To ensure continued access to these Forms, the system<1> {willTransferOwnership}</1> of the Forms to<2> {thisSystemAdministrator}</2> account. Forms that are not used by others will be deleted.
deleteDialog.irreversible: User deletion is irreversible, and all documents will be deleted.
deleteDialog.title: Deletion Confirmation
deleteDialog.xmlArchive: An XML archive will be made of the user's work which will be available for a short time on the server.

usersPage.intro: You can search, filter, and tag user accounts, as well as export summary information about the users on this server. See our <0>Tagging docs</0> for more.
usersPage.loadingError: Failed to load listing of users. Please try refreshing.
usersPage.ownerOfForms: the owner of Forms that are used by other users.
usersPage.ownerOfFormsAndTemplates: the owner of Forms and/or Templates that are used by other users.

piRoleDialog.grantPrompt: To grant the PI role to <0>{fullName}</0> please re-enter your password.
piRoleDialog.revokePrompt: To revoke the PI role from <0>{fullName}</0> please re-enter your password.
piRoleDialog.setVerificationPassword: Please set your verification password in My RSpace before performing this action.

tagDialog.description: You can tag users to categorise them, and filter users by tag. These tags are only visible to System Admins and Community Admins. If you’ve selected several users, only shared tags will be shown. <0>Read more about tagging users here.</0>
tagDialog.title: Tagging {count} {count, plural, one {user} other {users}}

usersPage.totalUsersTooltip: All users including admins and those with disabled accounts.
